title: sarcanthus beckleri
intro: Sarcanthus beckleri is a rare and endangered plant species, also known as the 'Dwarf Sarcanthus', belonging to the family Gentianaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sarcanthus beckleri are said to include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Sarcanthus beckleri often involve drying and processing the leaves and roots into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
